form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation ran last of 7 at this track on November 24 over 1500m, 26 len behind Jazz Famous with 56kg at $31.10. When resuming last campaign ran last of 9 at this track in the G3 Escorial on February 4 2024 over 2000m, on rain affected going; 21 len behind Online with 59kg at $54.10. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. First up last campaign fourth of 8 at this track May 18 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Post Heart with 55kg at $38.40. Could prove too smart for these.
